series_metadata.series_description: These files consist of records resulting from filings submitted to claim exemptions pursuant to Ohio Revised Code 1707.03(Q) & 1707.03(W). These filings may contain private placement memoranda, offering circulars, and other types of offering materials. Private Placement memoranda, offering circulars and offering material submitted with filings are not public records.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: hard copy in operating area from date of initial filing, or scanned and verified ; Electronic: Maintain machine readable records on database from date of initial filing
